It's okay to not be okay.
You are allowed to feel sad.
You don't have to explain it to anyone.
You don't have to carry everything alone.
This is one of them, and that's okay.
even when they're hard to explain.
You've survived every hard day so far.
It's okay to slow down today.
The world can wait for you.
You're doing better than you think.
I know it hurts right now.
You don't need to be strong today.
There's no wrong way to grieve a hard day.
You are loved even in silence.
Even when you have nothing to say.
but it is only a moment.
Take my hand for a while.
